steps.expected: App loads showing main page with existing profile (Validation User)
steps.observed: App loaded successfully, showed 'Welcome back, Validation User' with 'Begin Meditation' button

steps.expected: Session starts, navigates to /session, Marcus greets user by name
steps.observed: Navigated to /session, Marcus greeted with 'I am Marcus. Greetings, Validation User'

steps.action: Send user message 1: 'I've been struggling with finding peace of mind...'
steps.expected: Message appears in chat, AI responds
steps.observed: Message visible, AI responded with Stoic wisdom about inner peace and the tree bending analogy

steps.action: Send user message 2: 'That's helpful. The idea of bending...'
steps.expected: Message appears in chat, AI responds
steps.observed: Message visible, AI responded with quote about impediments and riverbank analogy

steps.action: Send user message 3: 'Sometimes the hardest part is knowing what to focus on...'
steps.expected: Message appears in chat, AI responds
steps.observed: Message visible, AI responded with Epictetus quote and practical advice about decision-making

steps.action: Take screenshot showing all messages before refresh
steps.expected: 3 user messages and 3 AI responses visible
steps.observed: All 6 messages visible, screenshot saved as VAL-MEDIT-003-before-refresh.png

steps.expected: Page reloads, URL stays at /session, messages are preserved
steps.observed: Page reloaded successfully, URL remained http://localhost:3101/session, all 6 messages (3 user + 3 AI) preserved

steps.expected: All user messages and AI responses still visible
steps.observed: All messages confirmed present: Marcus greeting, user message 1, AI response 1, user message 2, AI response 2, user message 3, AI response 3
No errors - only info/warning messages about React DevTools and React Router future flags

evidence.network: Messages persisted via backend API, verified by full conversation restoration after page reload

summary: Tested VAL-MEDIT-003 (Message persistence): PASS. Started a meditation session, sent 3 user messages with full AI responses (6 total messages including greeting). After page refresh, all messages were preserved and visible at /session. No console errors detected.
